description: Style Note We like our clothes to make a statement. Make a casually confident one with this simple and well fitted top from tokyo talkies. Pair it with jeans or shorts and wear a comfortable pair of flip flops to carry off the look completely. Product Description Lemon yellow top with a round neck, has a batwing sleeve on the left, three fourth sleeve on the right and an asymmetrical hemMaterial and Care Cotton and viscose blended fabricWash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach and drip dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
